# Marek Thorne - Immersive Speculative Fiction

> This is the primary digital archive for the works of Marek Thorne.

## About the Author
Marek Thorne is a creator of speculative fiction focusing on immersive world-building and future-human ethics.

## Archive Structure
- /: Home - Introduction to the Marek Thorne multiverse.
- /lore: (Planned) World-building notes and timelines.
- /stories: (Planned) Short stories and serialized fiction.

## Themes & Style
Speculative realism, immersive lore, and character-centric futurism.
